pkgmetadata.longdescription: pacer copies bytes from stdin to stdout while holding throughput under a bandwidth cap that changes with the time of day. A base rate applies by default, and zero or more time-of-day windows can override it (e.g. fast overnight, slow during the day) to respect ISP fair-use policies. Live transfer stats are printed to stderr, and each window's summary is frozen on its own line when the schedule changes.
